message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

participant Ctc
participant TrackController

box #LightGray
participant TrackModel
participant Block
participant Switch
end box

Ctc -> Ctc : Select Block
Ctc -> TrackController : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
TrackController -> TrackModel : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)

TrackModel -> TrackModel : getBlock()
TrackModel -> Block : getSwitch()
Block -> Switch : setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")

Switch -->] 
[<-- TrackController : new switch status
TrackController -> TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)

TrackController -->] 
[<-- Ctc : new switch status
Ctc <- TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)
@enduml
```

Wait, let me redo this more carefully:

```plantuml
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

participant Ctc
participant TrackController

box #LightGray
participant TrackModel
participant Block
participant Switch
end box

Ctc -> Ctc : Select Block
Ctc -> TrackController : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
TrackController -> TrackModel : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)

activate TrackModel
TrackModel -> TrackModel : getBlock()
TrackModel -> Block : getSwitch()
activate Block
Block -> Switch : setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")
activate Switch
deactivate Block

Switch -->> TrackController : new switch status
deactivate Switch
deactivate TrackModel

TrackController -> TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)

TrackController -->> Ctc : new switch status
Ctc <- TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)

@enduml
```

Hmm, let me be more precise:

```plantuml
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

participant Ctc
participant TrackController

box #LightGray
participant TrackModel
participant Block
participant Switch
end box

Ctc -> Ctc : Select Block
Ctc -> TrackController : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
TrackController -> TrackModel : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
activate TrackModel
TrackModel -> TrackModel : getBlock()
TrackModel -> Block : getSwitch()
activate Block
Block -> Switch : setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")
activate Switch
deactivate Block
Switch ..> TrackController : new switch status
deactivate Switch
deactivate TrackModel
TrackController -> TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)
TrackController ..> Ctc : new switch status
Ctc <- TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)

@enduml
```
